commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd ~/platform && git pull 2>&1 | tail -3 && bash scripts/launchers/launch-smoker-shard-a.sh 2>&1 | tail -10'
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'ls -la ~/platform/data/smoker-shard-a/smoker.pid 2>&1; cat ~/platform/data/smoker-shard-a/smoker.pid 2>&1 || echo no_pid; ps -ef | grep -v grep | grep run-pilot3 | head -2'
